---
title: "Course Schedule"
format:
    html:
        page-layout: article
tbl-colwidths: [3, 5, 12, 3, 3, 3, 3, 10]
citation-location: document
---

This page contains a schedule of the topics, content, and assignments for the semester.
Note that this schedule will be updated as necessary the semester progresses, with all changes documented here. Readings requiring institutional subscriptions can be accessed through the [Cornell Library](https://www.library.cornell.edu/).

::: column-screen-inset
| Week | Date        | Topic | Slides | Lab | HW | Reading |
:-----:|:------------|:------|:------:|:--:|:---:|:-------:|

:::
